conflict: Nick finds his own unsold paintings in the training data and must rate them alongside coworkers who don't know they're his
consequence: Identity crisis — the boundary between artist and system collapses; Nick is both the creator and the machine that digests creation
must_land_beats: Nick opening the batch and recognizing his own paintings — scraped, thumbnailed, stripped of his name
Tommy rating one of Nick's paintings a 2 for stylistic coherence — not even pausing
Bao rating another a 4, pausing over it, tilting his head
Nick rating his own work: he gives himself a 4 because a 5 would flag as outlier

payoffs_to_land.description: Nick's unsold paintings, whose online existence was seeded in Ch 1, appear in the training pipeline
The gallery near-miss in Ch 11 escalates to direct encounter — Nick's own work, not just his gallery's walls

pressure_source: Nick finds his own unsold paintings in the training data and must rate them alongside coworkers who don't know they're his
state_shift: Identity crisis — the boundary between artist and system collapses; Nick is both the creator and the machine that digests creation
